refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall update the worksite model within the customer-required timeliness for operational use by minimizing data acquisition latency and processing latency.
refined_fr.rationale: To meet the overall latency requirement, the update process is decomposed into two key sub-functions: acquiring timely data from the worksite and processing that data efficiently to update the model.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the latency of data acquisition and processing separately under representative operational scenarios to ensure combined latency meets p95 ≤ 1.0 s.
sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process acquired data to update the worksite model within latency constraints

candidate_dps: DP1: Use high-frequency telemetry data streams with prioritized network protocols
DP2: Implement edge computing for local data pre-processing to reduce central processing load
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use high-frequency telemetry data streams with prioritized network protocols

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency on network link quality
Processing latency coupling with data acquisition rate
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically separates data acquisition (telemetry) from processing, minimizing coupling by using prioritized network protocols to ensure timely data delivery.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network link supports prioritized telemetry without significant packet loss
Risk of network congestion impacting telemetry timeliness
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding edge computing (DP2) if network conditions degrade or latency targets are not met.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for telemetry data acquisition, processing, and worksite model update

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives high-frequency telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports prioritized data transmission for telemetry and tasking

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes telemetry data acquisition and processing, minimizing diffusion.
Primarily data source, limited containment of processing logic.
Focuses on control, minimal role in data processing.
No direct role in telemetry data processing.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing telemetry data acquisition and processing within NGHE Solution module reduces latency and interface complexity.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module is overloaded
Dependency on network link quality may still impact latency
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor processing load and consider distributing processing if latency targets are not met.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by focusing on prioritized telemetry data streams to meet latency requirements.

diffusion_risks: Potential over-centralization in NGHE Solution module could increase diffusion if processing grows complex.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the best module to own the DP, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring telemetry latency and processing times within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of telemetry acquisition and processing to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Evaluate network link performance under load to validate assumptions.
Consider edge computing augmentation if latency targets are not consistently met.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment satisfy the latency requirement with clear ownership and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process acquired data to update the worksite model within latency constraints

revise.why: Current level is sound; next step is to decompose sub-FRs further.

assumptions: Network link supports prioritized telemetry with minimal packet loss
NGHE Solution module can handle processing load without bottlenecks
open_risks: Processing overload in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Telemetry latency measurements under operational conditions
Processing time profiling within NGHE Solution module
